title: 3 Top Ranked Compounder Stocks to Buy Now and Never Sell
text: Some investors like active trading in stocks, while others like to invest for income through dividends. However, one way to grow your portfolio at an incredible rate over the long term is to buy Compounder Stocks.

title: Copart: Moat Built By Outstanding Management
text: Copart is enjoying market tailwinds in a dominant position that grows as the company gets bigger. Management has strong skin in the game, and it is still led by its founder. The CEO has been receiving all his compensation in stock options since 2009. Copart's highly defensive business model in both inflationary and deflationary environments comes with a valuation premium.

title: Copart's board OKs 2-for-1 stock split
text: Online auto auctioneer Copart Inc. CPRT, -1.07% said late Friday that its board has approved a 2-for-1 stock split, with each shareholder receiving one additional share for every one share they own. The additional shares will be distributed after close of trading on Aug. 21, Copart said.

title: Copart, Inc. Announces a Two-for-One Stock Split
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) announced today that its Board of Directors has approved a two-for-one split of its common stock. The stock split will be effected as a stock dividend entitling each stockholder of record to receive one additional share of common stock for every one share owned. Additional shares issued as a result of the stock dividend will be distributed after close of trading on August 21, 2023, to stockholders of record on August 14, 2023. The stock split.
